title: HelloWorld Webpart
description: Show hello world text in a polished SharePoint webpart experience.
summary: Render a beautiful static Hello World interface with refined spacing, typography, color, and responsive presentation. No SharePoint data access is required.

runtimeBehavior.summary: Render a static, design-forward welcome panel that presents the Hello World message with a premium visual treatment, clear hierarchy, responsive layout, and accessible default states.
features: Display the Hello World message as the primary visual focus
Use a polished panel layout with balanced whitespace, refined typography, and a restrained multi-color accent system
Provide supporting microcopy so the webpart feels intentional rather than bare
Adapt gracefully from wide SharePoint sections to narrow mobile layouts
Include clear empty, loading-free, and default states appropriate for a static webpart

uiStructure.title: Beautiful Hello Shell
uiStructure.description: A full-width responsive shell that centers the static greeting within a polished visual surface.

states.name: default
states.description: The enhanced greeting composition is visible when the webpart loads.

states.name: narrow
states.description: The layout stacks and tightens spacing on narrow SharePoint columns or mobile screens.

children.title: Welcome Panel
children.description: A refined surface with subtle depth, neutral background, and tasteful accent details.

states.name: default
states.description: The panel frames the greeting without requiring user interaction.

children.title: Eyebrow Label
children.description: A compact label that introduces the webpart as a SharePoint welcome moment.

children.title: Hello World Heading
children.description: The main greeting, styled with strong hierarchy and polished typography.

states.name: default
states.description: The text reads "Hello world" and remains the dominant element.

children.title: Supporting Copy
children.description: Short secondary copy that makes the static greeting feel purposeful and complete.

children.title: Accent Strip
children.description: A small visual accent using coordinated teal, coral, and gold tones to add polish without overwhelming the message.

screens.title: Beautiful Hello World
screens.description: A polished static Hello World screen with elegant typography, balanced spacing, and subtle multi-color accents.
